title: Fetha Nagast: The Law of the Kings
description: The legal code of the Ethiopian Empire — combining Roman law, Mosaic law, and canon law into one system that governed Ethiopia for 700 years.
introduction: The legal code of the Ethiopian Empire — combining Roman law, Mosaic law, and canon law into one system that governed Ethiopia for 700 years.

translation.text: This is the law of the kings, derived from the apostolic canons and the laws of the emperors, for the governance of the Christian kingdom of Ethiopia.
